postmark.Subject: Refinance — Marcus Webb (with guarantor)
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refi for Marcus Webb at 1142 Tory Road NW, Edmonton, AB T6R 2K8. Loan $280k.

Marcus is sole title holder; his income alone ($78k) is light on DSCR. Patricia Webb (Marcus's mother, $145k income) is guaranteeing the loan obligation — not on title, just on the note. Lender accepts guarantor income for qualifying.

Patricia's NOA can be forwarded if needed.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
